LightningComponentBundle.description: Displays a collection of SObject records as a visual picker and returns the selected record to the flow.

propertyType.name: T
propertyType.label: Record Type
propertyType.description: The SObject type of the records collection

property.name: records
property.label: Records
property.description: Collection of SObject records to display.

property.name: labelFieldName
property.label: Label Field Name
property.description: API name of the field to use as each item's label (e.g. Name).

property.name: descriptionFieldName
property.label: Description Field Name
property.description: API name of the field to use as each item's description. Optional.

property.name: iconName
property.label: Icon Name
property.description: SLDS icon name to display on each item (e.g. standard:location). Optional.

property.name: required
property.label: Required
property.description: If true, the user must select a record before proceeding.

property.name: selectedRecord
property.label: Selected Record
property.description: The SObject record the user selected.
